reviews.comment:
Esperamos media hora para cargar combustible y no pudimos hacerlo. Debimos ir a shell

(Translated by Google)
We waited half an hour to refuel and couldn't. We had to go to Shell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6ekxtUkd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Oreible la atención en surtidores.  La señora que atendía se ocupo de hablar con amigos dejando el surridor. Tanto es así que me tuve que ir a la Shell

(Translated by Google)
The service at the pumps was awful. The woman working there was too busy chatting with friends to leave her station. It was so bad that I had to go to a Shell station instead.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNULWMyVDdnRRAB

reviewReply.comment: Nos alegra saber que tuviste una buena experiencia. Esperamos verte pronto en tu próxima carga."
